data.content: Branch: feature/knots-dab8-execution-plan-compat (commit a7c42da). Added serde aliases on ExecutionPlanStep.knot_ids and ExecutionPlanData.knot_ids/unassigned_knot_ids so legacy beat_ids/unassigned_beat_ids payloads deserialize cleanly while serialization continues to emit only the canonical knot_ids. New tests in src/domain/execution_plan.rs cover the legacy deserialize path and assert no beat_id keys re-emit. make sanity passed (1055 tests, 95.41% coverage, +0.01%).
